| | Friend, Just like you, we're tired of the petty and divisive politics that has taken ahold of Republicans at the State Capitol. From rallying to overturn our free and fair election to pushing for an end to common-sense solutions to mitigate the spread of COVID-19, Minnesota Republicans are out of hand. We need your help and there is a way you can help at no cost. Minnesotans can participate in a program called the Political Contribution Refund. This program allows you to donate up to $50 per individual (or $100 per couple) to the House DFL and receive a full refund from the state. name: Team Stanton
subject: Getting the COVID-19 vaccine to everyone who needs it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
body:
Our number one priority here in Arizona and across the country is to get vaccinations to as many Americans as possible. Time is of the essence and I am certain under President Biden’s leadership, we will save lives. We’re going to need all the help we can get to make sure that happens, but together we can make sure that our communities bounce back from the pandemic so we can resume our normal lives.

Thank you,
-- Team Stanton

------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
------------------------------------------

Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: Team Warner
subject: The Postmaster General must resign (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The damage has been done.
|
---

| | Derek,

This email has a simple ask: **[Will you join Mark Warner in calling on Postmaster General Louis DeJoy to resign?
Add your name.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8fa/53d9897e/5529f63d/1c88dd4b/1256904143/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-dejoy")** As Donald Trump's Postmaster General, DeJoy failed Virginians and all Americans by:
* Removing mailboxes
* Slashing staff overtime hours
* And even trashing mail sorting machines

Even though he halted further changes after an enormous backlash, the damage was done.

**Mark continues to hear from Virginians with horror stories about mail delays, including late deliveries of crucial items like mail-order medications or bills.**

**_This is unacceptable._**

We need new leadership at the Postal Service, especially during the continuing COVID-19 crisis when Virginians are relying more than ever on USPS to stay connected and safe. From the delivery of groceries and household necessities to life-saving mail-order medications, the USPS provides a desperately needed link to critical resources.

**[Mark is circulating an _urgent_ petition calling on Louis DeJoy to resign as Postmaster General. Will you add your name?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8fa/53d9897e/5529f63d/1c88dd4b/1256904143/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-dejoy")**

Thank you,
Team Warner

name: CRITICAL NY Alert
subject: What Cuomo doesn’t want you to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Governors Association
body:
| | | |
---
Friend,

**The lies are getting worse! As more information is released in New York it is clear Gov Cuomo intentionally lied about the number of deaths in nursing homes.**

Gov Cuomo has been intentionally underreporting numbers of deaths to protect his image! This is outrageous. Our country cannot continue down this path, it's time to FLIP Blue states.

subject: what this relief package means for us

body:
|

| | Peter,

It’s almost been a year since our lives were upended and we all started to stay home to protect our families, our friends, and our community. With the one-year mark just around the corner, I’m writing to let you know why it’s critical we pass President Biden’s COVID-19 relief package immediately.

Our nation has suffered greatly throughout the COVID-19 pandemic. While Congress has taken action to help crush the virus and rebuild our economy, more help is needed. With President Biden’s plan, many will receive the relief they so desperately need, including more access to vaccines which is the key to combating the coronavirus. [**_Add your name now to help pass the COVID-19 relief package immediately so we can start producing more vaccines and help our nation heal!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25246868/273251880/-661946670?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjVlZDE5YS1lNzcyLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_KDj2dp0k5Sb_7X4kgl-S9U9pRb0wNmtbde4aUlzKs=&emci=fc655591-e672-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=125ed19a-e772-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2678920)

**Here are just a few reasons we need to pass it:**
* It will increase funding for vaccine distribution, testing, and will aid in hiring more public health workers to support response to the pandemic.

* It will provide funding to schools so they can reopen safely, buy PPE, reduce class sizes, and prevent teacher layoffs in the coming year.

* It will increase funding for State and Local government along with Native Tribes. This will help prevent layoffs of critical essential workers like firefighters and teachers and ensure much-needed services are continued.

* It will provide rental assistance, utility assistance, and mortgage payment assistance, to help folks stay in their homes.

* It will provide additional assistance to small businesses who have been struggling as a result of the pandemic.

* It will extend crucial pandemic unemployment programs through the end of August. Currently, these programs are scheduled to end in less than a month.

There is a light at the end of the tunnel, but we must act quickly!

[**_Add your name now if you think it’s time we pass the COVID-19 relief package and help increase access to the vaccine throughout our nation →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25246869/273251881/-661946670?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjVlZDE5YS1lNzcyLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_KDj2dp0k5Sb_7X4kgl-S9U9pRb0wNmtbde4aUlzKs=&emci=fc655591-e672-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=125ed19a-e772-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2678920)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25246870/273251882/-661946670?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjVlZDE5YS1lNzcyLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_KDj2dp0k5Sb_7X4kgl-S9U9pRb0wNmtbde4aUlzKs=&emci=fc655591-e672-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=125ed19a-e772-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2678920)**

Mike Thompson

body:
Joe Biden and the radical Left are at it again. Just one month into office, Biden is already meeting with special interest groups to discuss "common-sense" gun control.

Joe Biden and the radical Left are at it again. Just one month into office, Biden is already meeting with special interest groups to discuss "common-sense" gun control. That's right, the Democrats are coming after your Second Amendment rights AGAIN!

**Biden 's plan includes a ban on modern sporting rifles, standard capacity magazines, and registration of all firearms, and this will just be the beginning.** There is no telling what the radical Left will do next and if we don't act now, we could lose our Second Amendment rights.

Friend, believe it or not, the Democrats are already making moves to flip this seat from red to blue. This seat is a top target for the Democrats to flip in 2022. Last year, the Democrat dark money machine spent $11 million in this district. Next time, they will do all they can to spend even more. Michelle Steel needs your help to stop them in their tracks. == | | == | | == | == | | ==** We know Nancy Pelosi and the rest of the Democrats want to raise taxes and add burdensome regulations on small businesses. And we know this will destroy thousands of jobs and crush the spirit of entrepreneurialism that makes our economy strong. That's why we need your help to say enough is enough. Nancy Pelosi is doing all she can to undo common-sense conservative reforms that help American families. == Can we count on you to help us win back the House for Republicans? == Thank you, Team Steel == With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Thank You Connie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It’s the end of a historic era for Indiana as Connie Lawson announced this week she is retiring as Secretary of State.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470250?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Thank You Connie**_ It’s the end of a historic era for Indiana as Connie Lawson announced this week she is retiring as Secretary of State. Few public servants in our state’s history have served with such distinction as Connie Lawson. Throughout her time in public life, Connie has been one of the most dedicated and effective office holders in Indiana history. For nearly a decade, Hoosiers have trusted her leadership and during her term, Indiana has become a national role model in running safe and secure elections. Faced with unprecedented election obstacles in 2020, Secretary Lawson successfully navigated the challenges of the pandemic to ensure Hoosiers could safely exercise their right to vote and be confident in the outcomes. Connie Lawson will be missed in the Statehouse, but I know her contributions to our state will not end with her upcoming retirement.

Connie leaves big shoes to fill and I look forward to working with Governor Holcomb as he considers candidates for this important appointment.
Thank you,
Kyle

_**Photo** : Secretary of State Connie Lawson (center) at our 2018 State Convention with (L-R) Gov. Holcomb, Treasurer Kelly Mitchell, Auditor Tera Klutz, Sen. Mike Braun, and Chairman Kyle Hupfer._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Building One Indiana for All**_ This week, **Governor Holcomb** signed [Senate Enrolled Act 1](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=710c07d503&e=1acd9bb3d6), which provides businesses and schools with COVID liability protections. **_“The pandemic has affected Hoosier businesses, schools and others in ways no one could have foreseen just one year ago. To aid in the state’s recovery, I made providing assurances that they will not have to live and work in fear of frivolous lawsuits a part of my Next Level Agenda. Most Hoosier businesses and other organizations are making good faith attempts to protect their customers and employees, because it is the right thing to do and it makes for better business in the long run. I want to thank lawmakers for rapidly passing this key piece of legislation and sending it to my desk for signature.” -Governor Holcomb_**

[\--> Click here to learn more about COVID liability protections <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f4a370ed9f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Governor Holcomb** also provided a statement on Secretary of State Connie Lawson's retirement. _**"Indiana’s own Iron Lady, Secretary of State Connie Lawson, has long defined what true public service and leadership is and ought to be all about. Throughout her time in county, legislative and statewide office, she set the standard for commitment, composure, class and credibility. No matter the year or issues of the day, citizens could bank on Connie Lawson leading the way and inspiring others to follow." -Governor Holcomb**_

[\--> Click here for Governor Holcomb's full statement <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3b7348c0c1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bb00c745a3&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=99b7e75dbe&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a910178a0&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Happy Birthday First Lady**_ This week **First Lady Janet Holcomb** celebrated her birthday! Please join us in wishing our **First Lady** a happy birthday.
---
|
---
| _**Secretary Lawson: What They're Saying**_ Below are statements from some Hoosier elected officials on the retirement of **Secretary of State Connie Lawson** :
**_"Connie made it a goal to leave Indiana in a better place and during her entire public and private life, she has done exactly that. _**_**Congratulations to you and your family family upon your retirement." -Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch**_

_**"There aren't many public servants as effective and devoted to their work as Connie Lawson. From her barrier-breaking leadership in the General Assembly to her integrity and professionalism as Indiana's longest-serving Secretary of State, Hoosiers are fortunate to have benefited from her years of tireless, distinguished, and selfless service." -Sen. Todd Young

"Secretary Lawson has had a remarkable tenure as a public servant, and she is someone all public servants, myself included, can learn from. Over the years she has conducted herself with integrity, strength and determination – never backing down from a challenge or a call to serve – and Indiana should be proud to have had this woman in leadership in our state for so long." -Senate President Pro Tem Rodric Bray

"Secretary Lawson played an instrumental role in securing and reforming our elections system, and streamlining government services for Hoosier businesses. We are especially thankful for her tireless efforts throughout the pandemic to ensure the integrity of our democracy and voters' access to the polls. -Speaker of the House Todd Huston

"Secretary Lawson has served with distinction as Secretary of State, and I am privileged to have served alongside her. She has been more than a leader- she has been a mentor, role model, and friend. My best wishes go with her and Jack as they enter the next chapter of their lives." - Treasurer of State Kelly Mitchell **_

---
| |
---
|
---
| _**COVID-19 Vaccine Update**_ Thanks to **Governor Holcomb's** leadership, Indiana continues to lead the Midwest in percentage of citizens who have been fully vaccinated. If you’re 65 or over, you’re eligible to receive the vaccine! Learn more at [ourshot.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=50806a75a2&e=1acd9bb3d6). [\--> Click here for information on the COVID-19 vaccine in Indiana <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a1ff13074&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer on the Passing of Rush Limbaugh**_ _**"Few, if any, have done more to spread the conservative message and attract more people to our conservative movement than Rush Limbaugh. He was a trailblazer and an icon who will be missed. My prayers go to his family, friends, and millions of listeners." -Chairman Kyle Hupfer**_
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[releases statement on Secretary of State Connie Lawson's retirement](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1a66f1957d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[leads mental health roundtable](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ea2be9962b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[honors Black History Month](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e07293fb30&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[speaks against the Raise the Wage Act](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=651cd4eaa8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[defends the Hyde Amendment](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ea58710941&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[celebrates World War II vet Ed Goetz's 100th birthday](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1a97485667&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird **[appointed as top Republican on Agriculture subcommittee](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=64a374d971&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz **[is ready to work with her colleagues to protect our freedom](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f8dc1323e4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence **[introduces rural broadband SPEED Act](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48cc94d0d2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[warns of the dangers a $15 minimum wage would bring](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3aefa520d5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth **[visits local businesses in Corydon](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=16cb61d4ed&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: House Republicans
subject: Have you given up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
With the fate of the House Majority at stake, we can't give up now. And it's going to come down to you....

Fellow Conservative,

With the first special election this year just a month away and with more special elections on the horizon, we can't slow down--not for a single second. _In fact, we need to go on offense._

name: Team Hern
subject: FW: Return of the earmarks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Hi Peter. As you probably know by now, Kevin is on a mission in Washington, DC. He's working hard to bring an end to corruption, wasteful government spending, and the lack of transparency.

One way he's doing that is by pushing for the elimination of pork barrel spending - also known as ear marks.

From funding studies on things like cow flatulence to democrats earmarking money for their own in-district pet projects, there's a reason simple funding bills balloon out of control.

**[Will you help us fund the fight](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/47d787cfcc9ed9cc/5f42b1012b67627dc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** to educate voters and help persuade other Congressmen and women to come on board to end ear marks?

**[Thanks for any help you can provide](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/47d787cfcc9ed9cc/5792b6bbb2507c4ec3d6b838967d376c/34143)**. Sincerely,
Team Hern | |
---
TO: All Subscribers
From: Kevin Hern <info@hernforcongress.com>
Date: Tuesday, February 16, 2020 at 2:09 PM
Subject: Return of the earmarks
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/47d787cfcc9ed9cc/c8f0db44c7e620f0c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
Dear Peter,

This week, one of my fears came true: **Democrat leaders are bringing back earmarks.**

Ten years ago, then-Speaker Boehner got rid of earmarks for good – or so we thought. It was a bipartisan priority to eliminate the swampy practice of funding lawmakers’ pet projects in exchange for their support of the priorities of party leadership.

Pelosi and Schumer are bringing it back, which should concern all of us.

Unfortunately, I saw this coming. That’s why I included earmark eliminations in my Roadmap to Congressional Reform last month.

Americans overwhelmingly despise pork barrel spending because we see it for what it is. It enables career politicians and further separates Americans from the lawmaking process. It took the Democrats less than a month in power to betray the American people and bring back earmarks.

Now more than ever, we need lawmakers of integrity, men and women willing to stand up for the American people and not kowtow to party bosses and special interests.

**[Will you help me?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/47d787cfcc9ed9cc/2039cab737a8866dc3d6b838967d376c/34143)**

We **__must__** take back the majority next fall. We **__must__** elect conservative lawmakers who are committed to getting rid of earmarks, burying them so far that no power-hungry Speaker can ever bring them back.

**[Your donations help me fight back against the progressives](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/47d787cfcc9ed9cc/048a23b4eeeff39cc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** trying to push me out of office and eliminate your voice in Congress. Every dollar helps in the fight to preserve our values and ensure that leftist policies do not destroy everything President Trump and Republican leaders built in the last four years.

I’m honored to serve you in Congress, and I assure you that my vote will always belong to the people of Oklahoma’s First District, not special interests.

Thank you,
Kevin Hern
[**DONATE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/47d787cfcc9ed9cc/0dfc7cfd87d0a9bac3d6b838967d376c/34143)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013iYIbLxCvQWKfGgB4A1VKQzuVAy82q7JNqQ88pSWjQpJl1z9QpnSXrdSfEW0yi5jE18EhO3Qio-TE2T1vNGZOyU_3MGp8pQvifwkc-f7hrg1HYe3oqyrn5VDtKrZJ_6qP7ObkIo9oZU=&c=_Kq18xQGIMlM9NURUnPhQzQ2oJJIb-7Ru8eqoRy2yPwI5Y4Uein78Q==&ch=X98k-gcvoRY0UMmqVCMb5nEh-6DWHDxi6pWkQLjqBzlGm-5dyOoAkg==).

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Limbaugh returns his ‘talent on loan from God’
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b21050-7713bce646ef44b98e99ba3ceb7f47ca/89/701/ba8142f0-e244-45e9-b4f3-d881c5cd5618)** This week, we mourn the passing of the legendary Rush Limbaugh. _“We are deeply saddened by the passing of Rush Limbaugh. He was a legend in every sense of the word. He not only gave conservatives a powerful voice, he inspired and encouraged tens of millions of our fellow citizens to embrace ideas that allowed them to achieve the American Dream — in Ronald Reagan's words, to become whatever God intended them to become. Rush helped change America for the better, and his legacy will long outlast those of his detractors. We thank him for his unmatched contribution to the country he dearly loved. He will truly be missed. We will remember him and his loved ones in our prayers”_ **–Jenny Beth Martin, Honorary Chairman, Tea Party Patriots Action** | | | | | | | [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDUwLTc3MTNiY2U2NDZlZjQ0Yjk4ZTk5YmEzY2ViN2Y0N2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%&K=WrVtmd20aLfdOzT0vo08NA)

clean_body: This week, we mourn the passing of the legendary Rush Limbaugh. “We are deeply saddened by the passing of Rush Limbaugh. He was a legend in every sense of the word. He not only gave conservatives a powerful voice, he inspired and encouraged tens of millions of our fellow citizens to embrace ideas that allowed them to achieve the American Dream — in Ronald Reagan's words, to become whatever God intended them to become. Rush helped change America for the better, and his legacy will long outlast those of his detractors. We thank him for his unmatched contribution to the country he dearly loved. He will truly be missed. name: Team Cammack
subject: Packing the Supreme Court?
body:
Not on my watch...
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kIQ3heTYKpQ-aZsyl-_choa98yKNNYzH48oaVbgxqt0IZ7Gvjxs-D-_KSr1Pefjjx0L2vgd5Z3QvlexiqMiIAwh-Xb58OexgVSxe_e9He5Q0JllxZlNq9f-WKfkkPF792g1SEynmC0DyUpLc8eJ32ZxkuEItgra2QjZnP6OKx2pKxR_TzBivjmmgVBq7TwSX5CpViMPd4WQ=&c=j8A8GI5UkI1LE7Afi2XSfYXA3XmRc3SindLP1u9-RiD3sZGd8rthBw==&ch=IvtDb353Pl6qx0K9Bu0B7hNIUMhqWDTdoVdBdPLwn7fwmgVHfi8McA==)
---
| Patriot,
President Biden has made it clear that the things he talked about on the campaign trail are actually the last things on his list: unity and the interests of the American people.
He made it clear when he issued so many divisive Executive Orders that set our country back across the board and put the American people last.
For months now, liberals have been calling for additional seats on the U.S. Supreme court under a false sense of "urgency" claiming the court is "unbalanced" and seats have been "stolen." Lies to mask their real intent - packing the Supreme Court with far-leftists who will help them execute their libel agenda.
With President Biden's Supreme Court commission set to launch, liberals are eager to "pack the court."
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kIQ3heTYKpQ-aZsyl-_choa98yKNNYzH48oaVbgxqt0IZ7Gvjxs-D-_KSr1Pefjja-0bRtweQl-byhDVtqVWgwOGAs3JYGQ5rgeFu1MYXuqzhZMZb_yX5UoTyJkS_h3zBjAjXIr3jC_co78VLZL0lX_n0K4cQ6a2NN8yPn7BfMnKxloIT6Yf1wntCN-bmo6bTtt_AgvP5mQ=&c=j8A8GI5UkI1LE7Afi2XSfYXA3XmRc3SindLP1u9-RiD3sZGd8rthBw==&ch=IvtDb353Pl6qx0K9Bu0B7hNIUMhqWDTdoVdBdPLwn7fwmgVHfi8McA==)
---
| | | [STOP THE PACK - SIGN NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kIQ3heTYKpQ-aZsyl-_choa98yKNNYzH48oaVbgxqt0IZ7Gvjxs-D-_KSr1Pefjja-0bRtweQl-byhDVtqVWgwOGAs3JYGQ5rgeFu1MYXuqzhZMZb_yX5UoTyJkS_h3zBjAjXIr3jC_co78VLZL0lX_n0K4cQ6a2NN8yPn7BfMnKxloIT6Yf1wntCN-bmo6bTtt_AgvP5mQ=&c=j8A8GI5UkI1LE7Afi2XSfYXA3XmRc3SindLP1u9-RiD3sZGd8rthBw==&ch=IvtDb353Pl6qx0K9Bu0B7hNIUMhqWDTdoVdBdPLwn7fwmgVHfi8McA==)
---
| Liberals have always thrown tradition and precedent to the wind whenever it benefits them, and this is yet another example. They want the Supreme Court Justices to be able to legislate from the bench and implement their far-left policies, even though the Supreme Court is supposed to be NON-PARTISAN.
President Biden issued Executive Orders that bypassed Congress with no input from Republicans and has been assembling a Supreme Court commission, which will inevitably conclude in packing the court, legislating from the bench, and destroying conservative values in America. Enough is enough.
[Will you stand up to these radical policies with Kat today?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kIQ3heTYKpQ-aZsyl-_choa98yKNNYzH48oaVbgxqt0IZ7Gvjxs-D-_KSr1Pefjja-0bRtweQl-byhDVtqVWgwOGAs3JYGQ5rgeFu1MYXuqzhZMZb_yX5UoTyJkS_h3zBjAjXIr3jC_co78VLZL0lX_n0K4cQ6a2NN8yPn7BfMnKxloIT6Yf1wntCN-bmo6bTtt_AgvP5mQ=&c=j8A8GI5UkI1LE7Afi2XSfYXA3XmRc3SindLP1u9-RiD3sZGd8rthBw==&ch=IvtDb353Pl6qx0K9Bu0B7hNIUMhqWDTdoVdBdPLwn7fwmgVHfi8McA==)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Did you see me on Fox this week?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
This week, I joined Tucker Carlson on Fox News to discuss Nancy Pelosi's decision to put Russel Honore in charge of Capitol security. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c2a4a73e301a4c98a2aa2237039e709e&_e=WuAUKYdKD1EoVOaf3eMmXLcdHw-s6x05elGu6isnjmq9dToR5_8VUrpf8kjMVo2rtdz7YswniZBPboAb_r8bCc8ogHddIqpNuUUxOzlkNJddbZYXwXpoD8sB8GPScmewxJC-ILH53cHwMIDptJ1cY7nnEHIwty4z85MHn6zKYncDswR6S74XHNbwt_z0n5IpbbqvMI5RjvCzhMLKfDoJfmf3CfdOBPhJMDzmpVBXEx4l3bgwRu5-sAxEtsLxuL5PBheJliTd58fymdPjNQELjJIFNE189y7bA2SWQdZNUaPs4aMKHVN3n10Swz2rwhbdO3MEyOwprIWyv55aFYSf3HojMKECE_7nq1fDF3Pp-HI%3D) | |
---
Dear Peter,
This week, I joined Tucker Carlson on Fox News to discuss Nancy Pelosi's decision to put **Russel Honore** in charge of Capitol security.

_**If you missed it, you can watch my full interview here:**_

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Can you make an early investment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/G0oaqIj486LwPZHuFjYZ-jBsdl5H7LQCmBlLT2mzBIY=/NEsWlruU4eJXOWgFDAcwbdWJV1XxKOUb0GvuD7s96h8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210219-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

We're just over one month into 2021 and yet it feels much longer than that. I'd like to ask you to consider a contribution to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.

As this year's events unfolded, from the violent insurrection of January 6th, to President Biden's inauguration, to the first actions taken by our new president to combat the pandemic, the challenges we face today are enormous.

I decided to first run in 2017 to serve as a voice for Central Virginia. A voice for so many people who were struggling across my district.

**Although we 've made strides to improve people's lives by broadening access to rural internet, by increasing transparency in drug pricing, and by working to get money out of politics, we still have much to do.**

_**[Today, I'm asking you to join a core group of my supporters and become a Founding Member of my 2022 campaign.](https://act.myngp.com/el/G0oaqIj486LwPZHuFjYZ-jBsdl5H7LQCmBlLT2mzBIY=/NEsWlruU4eJXOWgFDAcwbdWJV1XxKOUb0GvuD7s96h8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210219-1-EM&amount=25)**_

The 2018 race and 2020 race were close, but we prevailed because of our grassroots support. With your help, we can do so again in 2022.

Thank you for your consideration,

_Abigail_

subject: Mike didn't see a problem with Marjorie Taylor Greene

body:
| []()
---

| | Mike Garcia can't dodge the truth on this one, Peter --

Mike says he condemned QAnon last year and the coup attempt at the Capitol last month. He says that should've been enough.

But here's our question: If Mike Garcia really _condemns_ QAnon, why was he spotted hanging out with noted QAnon conspiracy theorist Marjorie Taylor Greene _after_ the Capitol insurrection? And why didn't he vote to strip her of her committee assignments earlier this month? Why did he oppose the impeachment of Donald Trump for inciting violence on Congress? |
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b15c/29776869/87732a5/569d0df9/1913520832/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAyMTlfbWdfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2102_email_christy?refcode=em21_210219_mg_in")

Peter, Mike would like you to believe that anyone who points out his refusal to take a real stand against QAnon is simply lying -- trying to score political points. **But the facts don't lie.**

Marjorie Taylor Greene's conspiracy theories and racism are documented online. But Mike _didn't see the problem_ with keeping her on the Education and Labor Committee. **Trusting her with our kids' education just goes to show that Mike isn't in Congress to serve us -- only his own political ambitions.**

[**The 25th district deserves better than Mike Garcia. If you agree, please chip in $5 or anything you can afford to send him packing in 2022.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b15c/29776869/87732a5/569d0df9/1913520832/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAyMTlfbWdfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2102_email_christy?refcode=em21_210219_mg_in")

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: Declining Cases, Faster Vaccines, and Free Masks
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
This was a big week for our COVID-19 response, and I wanted to give you an update on how it's going.
Make sure that you're signed up for the Rhode Island Department of Health's [weekly vaccine distribution updates](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nF4OpjT1qGymzHt2VH0bOnyDE-xKdv9V_CHIKoPJz3dz6V0C-JLFpn_h0Lj7R1q5fqX9xd9ghv2oGYfr1DO_F9LA1Zpnffo_5ANhzBeSgzUrZbKNbQS3vux6uSWpaPqUtaR7jOkQYWtocnbu8pNe_UVeCRvJRpYVl-JsUeOB5lYmvRYygVXCE-a3SEGOAvv7tIWX_jflzC-kE1NMCqDMXWqmbqTunxCHX4qL1aKso9oMeftmGFnA7g==&c=fWwSydtAngojY4jpnjLBMosKncR8T6CFMiwgY5ONPLFpLXVXfYVI-w==&ch=E1mGaZMQrYM9X6IoGHQx0s-TbxlL6zgth2MsLGVYFHFpoui5O3fEjA==) as well as the Vaccine Notification Interest List on [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nF4OpjT1qGymzHt2VH0bOnyDE-xKdv9V_CHIKoPJz3dz6V0C-JLFppiu5SxpiNbhstNvCNjOv8D-4TGigHPuqzFqALMdlb9YRsVIzsLsIlm4hYWVNMIPnDpP68GmgKRvTkuFgc5bMMc=&c=fWwSydtAngojY4jpnjLBMosKncR8T6CFMiwgY5ONPLFpLXVXfYVI-w==&ch=E1mGaZMQrYM9X6IoGHQx0s-TbxlL6zgth2MsLGVYFHFpoui5O3fEjA==) to stay up-to-date on when you're eligible for vaccination.
---
| | |
---|---
|
DECLINING CASES

Our COVID-19 case numbers are continuing to head in the right direction. As of today, we stand at a 1.7% positivity rate -- our lowest in months -- and have had a precipitous drop in hospitalizations at a faster rate than our neighboring states and the rest of the nation. We also saw a decline in case counts and percent positivity among every age group during the past week.

There are two important factors that have fueled these results. The first is you. We couldn't have turned our numbers around without your patience and willingness to protect your fellow Rhode Islanders. Thank you, and please keep wearing your mask and getting tested regularly.

Secondly, we've been able to drastically cut our number of cases and, more importantly, our number of hospitalizations, by focusing our vaccination efforts on our most vulnerable populations: frontline health care workers, Rhode Islanders in congregate settings and high-density communities, and the oldest Rhode Islanders. Now that we've been able to shore up our health care system, we're able to move forward with a focus on speed and scale.
| | |
---|---
|
FASTER VACCINES

As we move into Phase 2 of our vaccination plan, the name of the game is faster distribution at more centralized sites. This week, we opened up vaccinations to all Rhode Islanders 75 years and older; starting Monday, Rhode Islanders 65 and older will be able to sign up as well. Appointments can be booked online at [VaccinateRI.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nF4OpjT1qGymzHt2VH0bOnyDE-xKdv9V_CHIKoPJz3dz6V0C-JLFps-oqWMROpUsnPO5VOgBvqqgyyCG_rl9ZHk2dY_pxdAFcAMXt-032YKBOvbhD379dltvQFk-OJ-cnc_4iIZf80Cc0bDbwE8fIg==&c=fWwSydtAngojY4jpnjLBMosKncR8T6CFMiwgY5ONPLFpLXVXfYVI-w==&ch=E1mGaZMQrYM9X6IoGHQx0s-TbxlL6zgth2MsLGVYFHFpoui5O3fEjA==) or by phone at 844-930-1779.

Yesterday alone, on the first day of our mass vaccination sites, we administered more than 10,000 doses. Let's keep going. Rhode Islanders 75 and older can also contact [CVS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nF4OpjT1qGymzHt2VH0bOnyDE-xKdv9V_CHIKoPJz3dz6V0C-JLFpsZtNvk-PnOKDuoodShXYEQdWlclDFGUG4vdFekiaE4kn5CPgs567nnqzIODNRCbzr9Wt6hJI6l8DwX-R_ArxEs=&c=fWwSydtAngojY4jpnjLBMosKncR8T6CFMiwgY5ONPLFpLXVXfYVI-w==&ch=E1mGaZMQrYM9X6IoGHQx0s-TbxlL6zgth2MsLGVYFHFpoui5O3fEjA==) or [Walgreens](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nF4OpjT1qGymzHt2VH0bOnyDE-xKdv9V_CHIKoPJz3dz6V0C-JLFps-oqWMROpUsBmy5LXgAgJ9Pn8oP1NszjjB3EaFLplqnwNC2AEDC8csK-9hrX2q4gr26UQNLIZzsplvPsnU3RDIFHUqKZf_0dzEi5eSFxSQr&c=fWwSydtAngojY4jpnjLBMosKncR8T6CFMiwgY5ONPLFpLXVXfYVI-w==&ch=E1mGaZMQrYM9X6IoGHQx0s-TbxlL6zgth2MsLGVYFHFpoui5O3fEjA==) about getting vaccinated at a retail pharmacy location, or reach out to your local city or town government.
| | |
---|---
|
FREE MASKS

Recent CDC research has shown that one of the best ways to reduce the spread of COVID-19, especially the newer and more contagious variants, is to wear either a tight-fitting mask or to layer a cloth mask over a high-quality medical mask. To make it easier for Rhode Islanders to do that, we're distributing more than 400,000 free KN-95 masks across the state over the next two weeks.

These masks will be provided to anyone getting tested for COVID-19. You can sign up to get tested today at [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nF4OpjT1qGymzHt2VH0bOnyDE-xKdv9V_CHIKoPJz3dz6V0C-JLFppiu5SxpiNbhstNvCNjOv8D-4TGigHPuqzFqALMdlb9YRsVIzsLsIlm4hYWVNMIPnDpP68GmgKRvTkuFgc5bMMc=&c=fWwSydtAngojY4jpnjLBMosKncR8T6CFMiwgY5ONPLFpLXVXfYVI-w==&ch=E1mGaZMQrYM9X6IoGHQx0s-TbxlL6zgth2MsLGVYFHFpoui5O3fEjA==) at a location near you.
| -Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=3ac9c92f-d341-42e1-8591-b4866bb98294)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=3ac9c92f-d341-42e1-8591-b4866bb98294) | [Customer Contact Data Notice](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/service-provider?cc=about-service-provider)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by
[ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE) [Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

name: Julian Brave NoiseCat
subject: Support the first Native American Cabinet secretary in U.S. history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Show your support today.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2153?t=3&akid=6813%2E53494%2ER9SXJ8) Friend, Rep. Deb Haaland, a Laguna Pueblo woman and 35th generation New Mexican, is poised to be the next secretary of the interior. If confirmed, she'll be the first Native American Cabinet secretary in U.S. history, marking a meaningful step toward racial justice and climate progress. Predictably, though, politicians with entrenched fossil fuel interests are trying to block her confirmation. In recent weeks, Sen. Steve Daines (R-MT), Sen. John Barrasso (R-WY), and Rep. Pete Stauber (R-MN) have all caricatured Haaland as a "radical." The facts tell a different story: **Recent Data for Progress polling shows that many of the policies Haaland would enact as interior secretary—like land and water conservation and increasing renewable energy production on public lands—are popular with voters across the political spectrum.** In the 116th Congress, Rep. Haaland introduced more bills with bicameral support than any other member of the House, and four of those bills were signed into law—an impressive feat in our polarized era. **Deb Haaland has stood up for me and for you. Today, we're asking you to stand up for Deb, in advance of her confirmation hearing next week.** **[Sign your name today to show your support for Rep. Deb Haaland and her historic nomination and confirmation.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2153?t=4&akid=6813%2E53494%2ER9SXJ8)** | [STAND UP FOR DEB ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2153?t=5&akid=6813%2E53494%2ER9SXJ8)
---
Rep. Haaland has a history of standing up to the fossil fuel industry—in word and in deed. In 2016, she traveled to Standing Rock, where she cooked green chili and tortillas for the water protectors resisting the construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline. If confirmed as interior secretary, she'll play a crucial role in keeping fossil fuels in the ground, creating jobs in renewable energy, and enacting President Biden's whole-of-government approach to the climate crisis.
Under her leadership, the department will implement popular policies that will make these United States—and the 574 federally recognized Tribal Nations across the country—more sustainable, equitable, and prosperous.
**[I could not be more thrilled to see Rep. Haaland on the cusp of joining President Biden's Cabinet. Are you? Add your name to our petition today to show your support for Haaland before her confirmation hearing on Tuesday.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2153?t=6&akid=6813%2E53494%2ER9SXJ8)**
With gratitude,
Julian Brave NoiseCat
Member of the Canim Lake Band Tsq'escen and a descendant of the Lil'Wat Nation of Mount Currie
Advisory Board Member, Evergreen Action
Vice President of Policy and Strategy, Data for Progress
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2153?t=7&akid=6813%2E53494%2ER9SXJ8)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=6813%2E53494%2ER9SXJ8).Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible.| PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

subject: Andrew’s already fighting for Long Island
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |
body:
Following in the footsteps of Former Congressman Pete King, Andrew wanted to make sure the first thing he did was finish the job for him and... [](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=8ba48a81a04249009e17f2fa69999edf&_e=vpV27R8fWBuLQBPWAXEy5okhN7NVF13Yjcd927v9-BCmrVzbENmp-vd0Z-uvm1YilAfkhZlwqngmQhxv3ANeaL-kaJi-RHrQO7swCJe8TX0leNleXygwBLnSTBSYbiG07VtdiiE6a0DKshKppkUwJo-IcVOcPNJelhicMRBjZRTFLExRDUBfRYFLXwbVskBPklfDp36_edsgKfB9H5vOXHeKx7NUynYAs7k18oQXUTkuDXLXI3oBWHpJtb-mA84fO3ySKlQyKADPG-FfCy55CbN4GWL7w1MgBm11HGebo2lMpAswfMKX5aZH-P3tgqJnHJT0290hDLzzFSsE319s6Zr-RCH3B5-Q_mYsqkwnyLABcVOgjfCE3bgKLxVs6abAMpYJ-5q69pHEkxwoi6PtGAOSjRBH15-ZPaCRgB0JtRW6zxchZMikQykHaQACJkqYGn2gStGhsb3W92e9UcxFMH102Wqr1EJt4-Z2YmmTiUi-D1C84rhEZA1doYPBVt1L) | |
---
Peter,

As you know, Andrew is already hard at work in Washington. He’s been working tirelessly for the people of Long Island and advocating for struggling small businesses around the country.

**In fact, Andrew just recently introduced HIS FIRST BILL IN CONGRESS! **

Following in the footsteps of Former Congressman Pete King, Andrew wanted to make sure the first thing he did was finish the job for him and the people of Long Island!

**This bill will: **
* **Provide funding to upgrade New York’s public transportation security systems from vulnerabilities.**
* **Help protect New Yorkers from security threats, including potential terrorist attacks and other hazards.**
* **Ensure proper oversight on public transportation security funds and guarantees that taxpayer money is being used properly. **

Peter, we wanted to send Andrew some notes of encouragement from incredible supporters like you and congratulate him on getting the work done for the people of Long Island! _**[Will you take a second to send a personal note thanking him for getting to work right away?](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=8ba48a81a04249009e17f2fa69999edf&_e=vpV27R8fWBuLQBPWAXEy5okhN7NVF13Yjcd927v9-BCmrVzbENmp-vd0Z-uvm1YilAfkhZlwqngmQhxv3ANeaL-kaJi-RHrQO7swCJe8TX0leNleXygwBLnSTBSYbiG07VtdiiE6a0DKshKppkUwJo-IcVOcPNJelhicMRBjZRTFLExRDUBfRYFLXwbVskBPklfDp36_edsgKfB9H5vOXHeKx7NUynYAs7k18oQXUTkuDXLXI3oBWHpJtb-mA84fO3ySKlQyKADPG-FfCy55CbN4GWL7w1MgBm11HGebo2kd8kKenFsxEt6_arG8NfOpynpLgC8RMeuxR6aG0PeYqUZ9C7xRCwhr62AqDYVtQBBBgrkVfmMlocJR713Vw7kr1hBYOB9JhAAxk81Wev82X_YbpXwUky-_b05bjWEhrYFy0OTncZudrQhwwQ0VcBi8zsUwZrDs_QFpcS0z7yg39vQ32OjZSbu2WhViZmVzhFxGDP5Cf-HEXaSKAHsVPZeo)**_

name: MJ Hegar
subject: How you can help Texans in need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Asking for your urgent help.

---
| | Peter,

I'm reaching out to ask for your urgent help.

**A devastating winter storm has shut down power and plumbing for millions of Texans. Many families have gone without food or water for days, and now we're even hearing increasing reports of loved ones dying from cold, fires, or carbon monoxide poisoning as they fight to stay warm.**

I love Texas and its people, so I've been continually monitoring the situation and donating to the organizations that are getting the most direct help to people.

**[If you're able, can you also split a donation between a few of the food banks fighting to feed and shelter Texans all across the state?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891d5a/7f51f7bc/5853ed87/4efb078d/2899878469/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txorgsupport?refcode=email_20210219__2492__")**

**Your gift will be split between the following organizations:**
* Feeding Texas
* San Antonio Food Bank
* Houston Food Bank
* West Texas Food Bank
* North Texas Food Bank
* Central Texas Food Bank
* and South Texas Food Bank

I will be making additional donations from leftover campaign funds to various Mutual Aid Societies that are doing such great work here.

My family and I went without power for nearly three days, and the temperature in our house fell to 55° F -- which is still a hell of a lot warmer than most people's houses. And I can tell you that it was really scary trying to keep my boys warm and fed. We bundled up and pretended like we were on Hoth (the ice planet from Star Wars) and tried to make a game out of it.

**But _we were luckier than most_ , and I know so many Texan families are really hurting right now.**

Peter, Texans are generous folks, and they're always ready to lend a helping hand. Well, right now, they need a hand from others.

**[If you're able to chip in (even a few bucks will go a long way), please split a donation between the food banks working tirelessly to help Texans in need.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891d5a/7f51f7bc/5853ed87/4efb078d/2899878469/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txorgsupport?refcode=email_20210219__2492__")**

Thank you so much,
MJ

---

|
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891d5a/7f51f7bc/5853ed87/4efb078c/2899878469/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").
---

body:
The Biden Administration has issued 53 Executive actions since January 20th... | | |

| |
---
| Friends,

Another week has gone by where Democrats put politics ahead of the people. Unemployment numbers are rising and the Left keeps killing jobs. _The Biden Administration has issued 53 Executive Actions since January 20th. _

I need your help to fight back against the Liberal agenda. I am doing everything I can to help my Republican colleagues take back the House - the fight for 2022 has already begun.

There is a little over 1 month until my first big fundraising deadline. We need to send a message that Republicans are united and not going to let radical policy fundamentally change the direction of our country. _We have to fight back now._

Please support my efforts to restore common sense and sound judgment to the U.S. House. Anything you can do today will make an impact ([donate here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=f34dafeb76&e=a9d1410029)). Thank you for your support.

Yours in the fight,

Tracey Mann

P.S. _I am confident that brighter days are ahead but I need your help to continue the fight - please donate today_ [(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=141f0754a2&e=a9d1410029).

name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: Your Weekly TL;DR Download
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee,
body:
How are your plans coming?

NDTC-TLDR-Logo ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiam10cXJpaW1sbXFvOGJvY3EzY24iLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vYUd1NUxmZUY0cS9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0 )

Peter — It’s hard to believe there’s one week left in
February!

Our goal this month was to help you build your communications,
digital, field, and fundraising plans.

( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiam10cXJpaW1sbXFvOGJvY3EzY24iLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vMFFQYWZ1M0NUbS9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10bGRyXHUwMDI2X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0 )

And we’re getting ready to close out strong with a training on
adapting them.

Because if 2020 taught us anything, it’s that we have to be ready
to change things at a moment's notice!

But wherever you are in the process, make sure to utilize our
resources, available to you online 24/7 for free.

Our virtual live training recordings, online courses, and mini
lessons are there to help you and your campaign succeed, on your
schedule.

— The NDTC Team

----------------------------------
VIRTUAL LIVE TRAINING WEEK OF 2/22
----------------------------------

Our planning series has wrapped up. Now let’s talk about adapting
those plans.

We know. You worked hard on putting those winning
plans together, but you need to be ready to go with the flow as
your campaign progresses.

How to Adapt Your Political Campaign Plan

( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiam10cXJpaW1sbXFvOGJvY3EzY24iLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vUmdPRnpmVjhjdC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10bGRyXHUwMDI2X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0 )

Wednesday, February 24 at 8 pm ET

This training will teach adjusting your campaign plans to meet
goals. We’ll specifically look at how your budget will adjust
with fundraising efforts and how current events can impact your
campaign plans (2020 we’re looking at you).

RSVP NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiam10cXJpaW1sbXFvOGJvY3EzY24iLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vTXlhZFc3NHJLaC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10bGRyXHUwMDI2X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0 )

-----------------------------------
MINI LESSONS ON ADAPTING YOUR PLANS
-----------------------------------

We get that you're probably super busy between work, life, and
campaigning, which means you might not have a ton of time to
dedicate to training.

But with us, you don’t need a ton of time! Check out our mini
lessons below on adapting your plans below.

Each only takes about 10 minutes to complete, so that means in
less than one hour you’ll learn how to adapt all of your plans!

How to Adapt Your Political Campaign’s Digital Plan
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiam10cXJpaW1sbXFvOGJvY3EzY24iLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vaWlYWGM2UHQ4Vy9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10bGRyXHUwMDI2X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0 )

TAKE MINI LESSON →

clean_body: How are your plans coming? NDTC-TLDR-Logo ( ) Peter — It’s hard to believe there’s one week left in February! Our goal this month was to help you build your communications, digital, field, and fundraising plans. ( ) And we’re getting ready to close out strong with a training on adapting them. Because if 2020 taught us anything, it’s that we have to be ready to change things at a moment's notice! But wherever you are in the process, make sure to utilize our resources, available to you online 24/7 for free. Our virtual live training recordings, online courses, and mini lessons are there to help you and your campaign succeed, on your schedule. — The NDTC Team VIRTUAL LIVE TRAINING WEEK OF 2/22 Our planning series has wrapped up. Now let’s talk about adapting those plans. We know. You worked hard on putting those winning plans together, but you need to be ready to go with the flow as your campaign progresses. How to Adapt Your Political Campaign Plan ( ) Wednesday, February 24 at 8 pm ET This training will teach adjusting your campaign plans to meet goals. We’ll specifically look at how your budget will adjust with fundraising efforts and how current events can impact your campaign plans (2020 we’re looking at you). RSVP NOW → ( ) MINI LESSONS ON ADAPTING YOUR PLANS We get that you're probably super busy between work, life, and campaigning, which means you might not have a ton of time to dedicate to training. But with us, you don’t need a ton of time! Check out our mini lessons below on adapting your plans below. Each only takes about 10 minutes to complete, so that means in less than one hour you’ll learn how to adapt all of your plans!
